hooks.command: sh -c 'f="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.json|*.css|*.md) [ -f "$f" ] && npx prettier --write "$f" 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac'

sh -c 'cmd="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND"; case "$cmd" in *"--force"*|*"reset --hard"*|*"clean -f"*|*"branch -D"*|*"checkout --"*) printf "
[WealthWise] WARNING: Destructive git operation detected:
  %s
Verify this is intentional before proceeding.
" "$cmd" >&2 ;; esac; exit 0'
